nasb.text: Therefore when the Lord knew that the Pharisees had heard that Jesus was making and baptizing more disciples than John

esv.text: Now when Jesus learned that the Pharisees had heard that Jesus was making and baptizing more disciples than John

cnv.text: 主知道法利賽人聽見他收門徒和施洗比約翰更多，

csbs.text: 耶稣知道，法利赛人听说他收门徒和施洗比约翰更多。
